title: Prunus avium lusus pendula
taxonomy: Prunus avium lusus pendula is a cultivar of the wild cherry tree. It belongs to the family Rosaceae, which includes many other fruit trees and flowering plants. Prunus avium lusus pendula is a variant of the European cherry tree, specifically known for its weeping habit. This classification places it within the kingdom Plantae, and more specifically within the order Rosales. It is also a subspecies of the sweet cherry tree, Prunus avium.
